description:
A data center in Phoenix, AZ is evaluating a 1.5 MW Natural Gas Fuel Cell for baseload power. Create a SAM project that models a Fuel Cell system using the Commercial financial model. Set the location to Phoenix, AZ and configure the system capacity to exactly 1500 kW (1.5 MW). Leave the operational mode on baseload/continuous dispatch. Run the simulation.

Save the SAM project file to `/home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/datacenter_fuel_cell.sam` (or `.py` if scripting).

Finally, create a JSON results summary file at `/home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/fuel_cell_results.json` containing the following structure:
